title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC are on the latest version
scenario: Language update via Device Settings > Language applies correctly to charge case menus when earbuds and case are on latest firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with the device connected and already on the latest firmware version.
2. Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap on Language.
4. Select a new language from the available language list.
5. Tap Update Now to initiate the language update.
6. Wait for the language update process to complete.
7. Verify that the charge case menus (e.g., LED indicators, voice prompts, or any on-case display) reflect the newly selected language.
expected: The language update completes successfully without errors. The charge case menus and any on-case display or voice prompts reflect the newly selected language.
